name: headspin-control
description: HeadSpin device control for Claude Code: skills, slash commands, subagents, hooks, and a bundled MCP server (20 REST tools). Authenticate to a HeadSpin environment, enumerate and lock real devices, drive them over documented REST/Appium surfaces, and — new in 1.1 — run full capture sessions end-to-end (adb lock/shell/start/stop capture, live-validated on real devices 2026-07-03), list capture sessions, pull Waterfall issue-card reports, download session artifacts (HAR network waterfall, screen-recording MP4, device event logs), and read device time series (memory, battery, network, video-quality). Every tool is a real Bearer-REST call, live-validated against api-dev.headspin.io captured sessions on 2026-07-02 (see e2e-evidence/headspin-forge-260702/v11-report-validation/).

api_host.title: HeadSpin API host
api_host.description: Base URL for the HeadSpin REST API. Use the dev environment for the cookbook, your own subdomain for production.

ui_host.title: HeadSpin UI host
ui_host.description: Base URL for the HeadSpin web UI; used to discover device tunnel hosts and to confirm the environment before connecting.

api_token.title: HeadSpin API token
api_token.description: Bearer token from your HeadSpin profile (Settings -> API Tokens). Stored in the OS keychain when 'sensitive' is true; see plugins-reference.md for the storage trade-off.

tunnel_host.title: Default device tunnel host
tunnel_host.description: Region host used for per-device control websockets. Override per device if your devices are spread across regions.

tunnel_port.title: Default device tunnel port
tunnel_port.description: TCP port for the websocket control channel. Confirmed in the 2026-07-02 HAR.
